name: Nandakumar C. K.
role: Senior Advocate, High Court of Karnataka
organisation: Law Chambers of C. K. Nandakumar
body: Nandakumar is a Senior Advocate at the High Court of Karnataka, designated in 2021, and a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators. He built the Law Chambers of C. K. Nandakumar over more than a decade into a strong corporate, commercial, and civil litigation and arbitration practice. He brings deep courtroom and arbitration experience to PUCAR's work.
